nodes.name: deploy-to-vps.sh
nodes.summary: Bash deployment script that syncs the local dist/ build to a VPS over SSH/rsync, creating a timestamped backup of the remote directory before overwriting. Targets ailinksdb.masellas.info.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: Root ESLint flat config enabling TypeScript, React Hooks, and React Refresh rules for all .ts/.tsx files, with dist/ excluded from linting.

nodes.name: api-DyDpKlVl.js
nodes.summary: Minified build artifact bundling the shared API layer: config constants, UI string constants (Catalan locale), and async functions for fetching/saving bookmarks and categories, plus a Claude AI categorization proxy call.

nodes.name: popup-DbKNwE_q.js
nodes.summary: Minified build artifact for the extension popup UI, bundling the full React popup component tree. Imports from the api build artifact.

nodes.name: service-worker.js
nodes.summary: Minified build artifact of the Chrome extension service worker. Handles CHECK_DUPLICATE, SAVE_BOOKMARK, ADD_CATEGORY, and GET_CATEGORIES messages from the popup, with in-memory category caching (5-minute TTL).

nodes.name: service-worker.ts
nodes.summary: Chrome extension service worker source. Listens for popup messages (CHECK_DUPLICATE, SAVE_BOOKMARK, ADD_CATEGORY, GET_CATEGORIES) and dispatches to the shared API layer. Maintains an in-memory category cache with 5-minute TTL to reduce API round-trips.

nodes.name: getCachedCategories
nodes.summary: Async function that returns categories from an in-memory cache if fresh (< 5 min old), otherwise fetches from the API and updates the cache. Falls back to stale cache or ['Altres'] on error.

nodes.name: content.js
nodes.summary: Minified build artifact of the content script. Extracts page metadata (title, description, author, URL) from DOM/meta tags and responds to GET_METADATA messages from the extension popup.

nodes.name: content.ts
nodes.summary: Chrome extension content script source. Scrapes page metadata (title, description, author, URL) from OG/Twitter/standard meta tags with fallback strategies, and exposes it via a chrome.runtime message listener responding to GET_METADATA.

nodes.name: extractMetadata
nodes.summary: Extracts page title, description, author, and URL from the DOM using OG tags, Twitter meta tags, standard meta tags, and plain HTML elements as fallbacks. Returns an ExtractedMetadata object.

nodes.name: index.tsx
nodes.summary: Entry point for the Chrome extension popup. Mounts the Popup React component into the DOM root using ReactDOM.createRoot inside React.StrictMode.
